title: thelypteris normalis
intro: Thelypteris normalis, also known as the Narrow-leaved Maidenhair Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is native to tropical regions of Asia and is often used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris normalis include reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and acting as a natural antiseptic. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is also used in traditional remedies as a poultice or compress to aid in wound healing and skin conditions.
